name: Sinigang Na Manok (Chicken in Sour Broth)
recipeIngredient: 2 to 3 pounds chicken fryer, cut up
5-6 pieces medium sampaloc (tamarind pods), about 1 package (powdered)
1 medium radish, cut into pieces (or 10 red onions, thinly sliced)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, sauté garlic, onion, and tomatoes in hot oil until fragrant.
2. Add the chicken pieces and cook, stirring occasionally, for 10 minutes or until the chicken turns slightly golden.
3. Stir in salt, pepper, patis, tamarind powder, and 5 cups water. Bring to a simmer and cover.
4. Cook on low heat for 30 minutes or until the chicken is tender.
5. Add radish and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Stir in mustasa (mustard greens) and return to a simmer without stirring. Remove from heat, adjust seasoning if needed, and serve hot.
